name: f1-analytics-dashboard
description: F1 race predictions + telemetry replay dashboard for the 2025 season

scripts.dev: concurrently "python3 -m uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install-all: pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install && npm install --prefix frontend
